name: Roasted Acorn Squash Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup heavy cream or light cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Wrap each wedge of squash tightly in foil and place the packages on the bottom rack of the oven.
3. After 30 minutes, remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
4. Melt butter in a 2-quart heavy-bottomed saucepan over medium-low heat. Gently cook onion and garlic until soft, about 10 minutes.
5. Add chicken broth to the onion mixture and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Scoop out the flesh from the squash (discard seeds and skin) and add it to the soup. Add salt, pepper, and sugar. Simmer for another 10 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
8. Purée the soup in a food processor or blender and stir in cream, cinnamon, and mace. Serve hot.
